requirement_topic.en: Battery Safety Evidence — TCVN / IEC 62619 and IEC 62933
requirement_topic.zh: 电池安全证据——TCVN / IEC 62619 与 IEC 62933
requirement_topic.zht: 電池安全證據——TCVN / IEC 62619 與 IEC 62933

summary.en: Vietnam projects may request battery safety evidence against Vietnamese national standards where adopted, or against IEC 62619 for secondary lithium cells and batteries for industrial applications and IEC 62933 for electrical energy storage systems. This dataset does not confirm a Vietnam-wide mandatory whole-unit BESS certification solely under TCVN / IEC 62619 or IEC 62933; the obligation should be checked in the import scope, tender specification, power-purchase documents, grid-connection package, and local project approvals.
summary.zh: 越南项目可能要求依据已采纳的越南国家标准，或依据IEC 62619（工业应用二次锂电芯和电池）及IEC 62933（电能储能系统）提供电池安全证据。本数据集未确认越南存在仅依据TCVN/IEC 62619或IEC 62933的全国统一整机BESS强制认证；应在进口范围、招标规范、购售电文件、并网资料包及当地项目批准中核查义务。
summary.zht: 越南項目可能要求依據已採納的越南國家標準，或依據IEC 62619（工業應用二次鋰電芯和電池）及IEC 62933（電能儲能系統）提供電池安全證據。本資料集未確認越南存在僅依據TCVN/IEC 62619或IEC 62933的全國統一整機BESS強制認證；應在進口範圍、招標規範、購售電文件、併網資料包及當地項目批准中核查義務。

standards_or_laws: TCVN national standards where adopted for the project scope

summary.en: China commonly uses GB 44240-2024 as the compulsory safety baseline for lithium-ion cells and batteries for electric energy storage, with GB/T 36276-2023 and GB/T 36558-2023 as common GB-standard cn_common_equivalent technical references. These documents can support a Vietnamese technical file but do not replace a TCVN, IEC, tender, grid, or local approval requirement.
summary.zh: 中国通常以GB 44240-2024作为电力储能用锂离子电芯和电池的强制安全基线，并将GB/T 36276-2023和GB/T 36558-2023作为常见GB-standard cn_common_equivalent技术参考。这些文件可支持越南技术档案，但不能替代TCVN、IEC、招标、并网或当地审批要求。
summary.zht: 中國通常以GB 44240-2024作為電力儲能用鋰離子電芯和電池的強制安全基線，並將GB/T 36276-2023和GB/T 36558-2023作為常見GB-standard cn_common_equivalent技術參考。這些文件可支持越南技術檔案，但不能替代TCVN、IEC、招標、併網或當地審批要求。

gap.en: The practical gap is evidence mapping. Exporters should prepare cell, module, rack, BMS, PCS, thermal-management, and system safety evidence that maps China GB reports to the requested TCVN or IEC clauses, while confirming whether Vietnam requires local acceptance, Vietnamese-language documentation, or project-owner review.
gap.zh: 实际差距在于证据映射。出口商应准备电芯、模组、电池架、BMS、PCS、热管理和系统安全证据，将中国GB报告映射到被要求的TCVN或IEC条款，同时确认越南是否要求本地接受、越南语文件或项目业主审查。
gap.zht: 實際差距在於證據映射。出口商應準備電芯、模組、電池架、BMS、PCS、熱管理和系統安全證據，將中國GB報告映射到被要求的TCVN或IEC條款，同時確認越南是否要求本地接受、越南語文件或項目業主審查。

mandatory_status.target: Not confirmed as a universal whole-unit BESS mandatory certification in Vietnam; mandatory or contract-required where a law, TCVN adoption, tender, EVN/MOIT grid review, or project approval incorporates the standard
mandatory_status.cn: GB 44240-2024 is mandatory for covered China domestic electric-energy-storage lithium-ion cells and batteries; GB/T 36276-2023 and GB/T 36558-2023 are commonly used recommended technical references

compliance_verdict.en: [INFORMATIONAL] Do not assume China GB battery reports are sufficient for Vietnam. Map GB 44240-2024, GB/T 36276-2023, and GB/T 36558-2023 evidence to the TCVN / IEC 62619 and IEC 62933 clauses requested by the Vietnamese project or approval route.
compliance_verdict.zh: [仅供参考] 不应假定中国GB电池报告已足以满足越南要求。应将GB 44240-2024、GB/T 36276-2023和GB/T 36558-2023证据映射至越南项目或审批路径要求的TCVN/IEC 62619和IEC 62933条款。
compliance_verdict.zht: [僅供參考] 不應假定中國GB電池報告已足以滿足越南要求。應將GB 44240-2024、GB/T 36276-2023和GB/T 36558-2023證據映射至越南項目或審批路徑要求的TCVN/IEC 62619和IEC 62933條款。
